## Summary

Explain the user or operator problem this pull request addresses.

## Change

Describe the behavioral change, not just the file delta.

## Validation

- [ ] `tools/scripts/check_harness.sh`
- [ ] Targeted tests or runners for the changed area
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior or user-facing flows changed

## Risk

Call out regressions, edge cases, or follow-up work that remains.
